result_summary: Found that improve=True can trigger a global, non-idempotent skill improvement pass and identified missing end-to-end coverage for enrich/improve/agentic retrieval paths.
error_message: The PR has useful smoke coverage, but the side-effectful improve=True and agentic retrieval paths lack integration tests proving graph/vector consistency and scoped behavior.

review.primary_finding: remember_skill_run_entry(..., improve=True) triggers improve_failing_skills over the full node set while inspect_skill generates time-based inspection ids, so repeated low-scoring runs can create fresh inspections/amendments for the same failure pattern.
secondary_gaps: AgenticRetriever._run_tool_safely does not catch ToolNotFoundError from execute_tool lookup.
Remote cloud remember does not run the local skill-source dispatch path before returning through client.remember.
Current tests do not cover enrich=True, improve=True, real graph/vector consistency, or agentic retriever plus SkillRun recording end-to-end.

verification.notes: The search factory target skipped all async tests when run with pytest alone; pytest-asyncio was required.

moss.status: no Moss retrieval or write observed for this local test run

cognee.status: SkillRunEntry fields recorded locally; no Cognee write log observed
